creator: gnikl@justmail.de
text:
(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #0)
> The configure script has the --enable-freetype-config but cmake doesn't have
> an equivalent option.
> The port was switched to cmake and it now doesn't install the the
> freetype-config executable.
Right, with the switch to cmake in bug #251512 that script got removed. I am a bit suprised that unavailabilty of the script is causing issues within the ports tree now.

I half-hearted expressed some concerns in another bug #262877, comment #18 and comment #20.
